name: BeOne Medicines Ltd.
summary: BeOne Medicines Ltd. (formerly BeiGene) is a global oncology company focused on developing and commercializing innovative medicines for cancer patients. The company develops both small molecule and large molecule biologic therapies, operates its own manufacturing facilities, and markets approved medicines across the U.S., China, EU, UK, Switzerland, and other international markets. It also engages in strategic collaborations and licensing arrangements to expand its pipeline.

products.name: Small molecule medicines
products.description: Oncology-focused small molecule drugs developed and commercialized globally, with independent production facilities supporting commercial and clinical supply.

products.name: Large molecule biologics
products.description: Biologic therapies for cancer treatment, manufactured in independent production facilities to support global commercial and clinical demand.

partnerships.description: BeOne in-licenses medicines and drug candidates for development and commercialization globally.
